---
title: "Hi I am Risheekkumar, Senior Data Scientist @ Amex"
subtitle: "I work on recommender systems and NLP — sequence modeling and LLMs — building AI-powered experiences at scale at American Express. I write about AI-powered product, engineering, and evals. Outside of work, I like playing chess."
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Open Source

- **[llm-rsa](https://pypi.org/project/llm-rsa/0.0.4/)** — Recursive Self-Aggregation: iteratively sample and synthesize multiple LLM candidate answers into a stronger final response.

## Blog
